applications.flagReason: The job description demands highly specific networking experience and knowledge that is not strongly reflected in the candidate's resume.
applications.jdText:
Minimum qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
1 year of experience working with and testing multiple Level 2 and Level 3 networking protocols as well as troubleshooting automation.
Experience with test methodologies, writing test plans and creating test cases.

Preferred qualifications:
1 year of experience in software development and testing.
Experience with automation and debugging.
About the job
Our computational challenges are so big and unique we can't just buy our hardware, we've got to make it ourselves. Our Platforms Team designs and builds the hardware, software and networking technologies that power all of Google's services. As a Networking Test Engineer you make sure that our massive and growing network is operating at its peak potential. You have direct experience with complex networking equipment, a deep understanding of networking protocols, test design and implementation chops and a background in IP network design. It's your job to make sure Google's cutting-edge technology can perform at scale.

Google is an engineering company at heart. We hire people with a broad set of technical skills who are ready to take on some of technology's greatest challenges and make an impact on users around the world. At Google, engineers not only revolutionize search, they routinely work on scalability and storage solutions, large-scale applications and entirely new platforms for developers around the world. From Google Ads to Chrome, Android to YouTube, social to local, Google engineers are changing the world one technological achievement after another.

outreachMessages.confident: I am excited about the Networking Test Engineer role at Google, and I am confident that my strong foundation in software engineering and AI/ML, combined with my eagerness to learn and adapt, makes me a competitive candidate for this position.
outreachMessages.curious: I've been following Google's innovations in networking technologies and am impressed by the company's commitment to pushing the boundaries of what's possible. I'd love to discuss how my skills could contribute to the Platforms Team's mission.
outreachMessages.concise: With a background in software engineering and a passion for learning, I'm interested in the Networking Test Engineer role. I'd appreciate the opportunity to discuss my application and how I can grow with Google.

gaps.text: The candidate lacks direct experience with Level 2 and Level 3 networking protocols, as well as test methodologies and troubleshooting automation specific to networking.

The candidate's resume highlights software development, machine learning, and AI, but does not directly address the deep understanding of networking protocols and IP network design required for the role.
The candidate has a strong background in software engineering and AI/ML, which could be leveraged to learn and adapt to the networking domain with focused training and effort.

learningResources.title: Computer Networking
learningResources.description: This specialization provides a comprehensive introduction to computer networking, covering topics from the basics of network architectures to advanced concepts in networking.

learningResources.title: Networking Tutorials by Professor Nael Abu-Ghazaleh
learningResources.description: These video lectures offer in-depth explanations of networking fundamentals, protocols, and technologies, providing a solid foundation for understanding complex networking concepts.

learningResources.title: Introduction to Computer Networking
learningResources.description: This course introduces the fundamentals of computer networking, including network architectures, protocols, and performance metrics, offering a broad overview of networking principles and technologies.

learningResources.title: Computer Network
learningResources.description: This resource provides a wide range of tutorials, practice questions, and explanations on computer networking topics, serving as a valuable resource for both beginners and experienced professionals looking to review or deepen their understanding of networking concepts.

learningResources.title: Networking Certification
learningResources.description: This certification path covers the basics of networking, including network fundamentals, protocols, and security, offering a hands-on approach to learning networking skills through practical projects and exercises.

profile.resumeText:
PRATIK KAMBLE
+91 98765 43210  |  pratikk.ce22@mitaoe.ac.in  |  linkedin.com/in/pratik-kamble  |  github.com/pratikk-dev  |  Pune, MH
EDUCATION
MIT Academy of Engineering, Alandi (Pune)	Aug 2022 – May 2026
B.E. Computer Engineering · Savitribai Phule Pune University  CGPA: 8.05 / 10.0
Vidyalankar Junior College, Mumbai	2020 – 2022
HSC (Science) · Maharashtra State Board  ·  87.4%
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages: Python, JavaScript / TypeScript, C++, SQL, Bash    Frameworks: React, Next.js, FastAPI, Node.js, Tailwind CSS
AI / ML: PyTorch, scikit-learn, LangChain, Groq API, Hugging Face, Llama 3    Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase
Cloud & DevOps: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda), Docker, Vercel, GitHub Actions    Tools: Git, Postman, Tableau, Figma, Linux
EXPERIENCE
Software Engineering Intern — NeuralBridge Technologies · Pune (Hybrid)	May 2025 – Jul 2025
Built a RAG-based internal knowledge assistant using LangChain + Llama 3, reducing employee query resolution time by 38%.
Developed FastAPI microservices for document ingestion pipeline, handling 5,000+ PDF pages with chunking and Pinecone vector embedding.
Integrated Slack bot interface adopted by 120+ engineers across three product teams within one month of launch.
Machine Learning Research Intern — IIT Bombay · Synapse AI Lab (Remote)	Dec 2024 – Feb 2025
Researched graph neural networks for fraud detection on transaction networks; achieved 93.2% F1 on a 2M-node benchmark.
Co-authored workshop paper submitted to ICLR 2025 (FinML Workshop) on heterogeneous graph sampling strategies.
Automated hyperparameter sweeps using Optuna, cutting experimentation cycles by 4×.
PROJECTS
AI Job Application Command Centre — Next.js · Groq / Llama-3.3-70b · Lemma SDK · Supabase	Jun 2026
End-to-end platform for students managing multi-platform job searches — JD parser, 'Signal Score' fit scorer, resume tailor, recruiter message drafter, Kanban pipeline tracker, and AI interview prep generator.
Integrated Lemma SDK for agent orchestration; Groq API (llama-3.3-70b) for sub-second inference; Clerk auth + Supabase Postgres with row-level security. Deployed on Vercel.
TradeMind — Explainable AI Investment Profiler — React / TypeScript · FastAPI · Groq API	Mar 2026
Conversational AI that profiles investor risk appetite and generates explainable portfolio recommendations with SHAP-style reasoning narratives.
Implemented multi-asset backtesting engine (equities, ETFs, crypto) with visual equity curves rendered using Recharts.
Indian Startup Ecosystem — Tableau Analytics Dashboard — Tableau · Python · Pandas	Jan 2026
Designed a two-dashboard Tableau Story ('Ecosystem Overview' + 'Geography & Players') over 10-year funding data across 6,000+ rounds with nine analytical problem statements.
HACKATHONS & ACHIEVEMENTS
HackSphere 2026 — National Level Hackathon  ·  Runner-Up (240 teams)	Feb 2026
Real-time disaster response coordination platform using multi-agent LLMs and satellite imagery analysis. Team of 4 · 36 hrs.
Lemma SDK Launch Hackathon 2026  ·  Finalist — Top 10 globally (800+ submissions)	Jun 2026
Smart India Hackathon 2025  ·  Institute Winner	Aug 2025
NLP-powered grievance classification system routing 92% of municipal complaints to correct departments automatically.
CERTIFICATIONS & ACTIVITIES
• AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (2025)	• Tech Lead, MITAOE Developer Club (2024–25)
• Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate	• Core Member, E-Cell MITAOE
• Supervised ML: Regression & Classification · Coursera	• 400+ LeetCode problems · Rating: 1,742
